title: NLP-017-what-is-the-difference-between-word2vec-and-glove
author: AI 面试题库
abstract:
NLP-017 What is the difference between word2vec and GloVe?

 17. What is the difference between word2vec and GloVe?
答案要点:
| 维度 | word2vec | GloVe |
|------|----------|-------|
| 方法 | Predictive (预测上下文) | Count-based (共现矩阵) |
| 训练 | 局部窗口 | 全局统计 |
| 速度 | 较慢 | 较快 |
| 效果 | 相似 | 相似 (GloVe 略优) |
| OOV 处理 | 无 | 无 (FastText 有) |

质量评分: 90/100 ⭐⭐⭐⭐

---

---
